jobs.title: Customer Service Specialist Jewellery
jobs.description:
The Customer Service Specialist Jewellery is responsible for executing and coordinating customer service activities in the wholesale direct markets, especially the Italian one, in order to provide Guess partners with all necessary tools and information to perform their daily tasks. He/she could also assist customer service activities for other markets, within the wholesale channel.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Sales campaign

Post sales campaign

## Requirements
- Experience: at least 3 years’ experience in similar field
- AS400 or Stealth experience is mandatory
- Education: University Degree
- Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus
- PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using analytical systems
- Proactively works towards set goals and has a problem solving mind-set
- Excellent execution, high respect of deadlines and strong organizational skills
- Open-minded and a good team player, ability to manage stressful situations

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

Potrebbe anche assistere nelle attività di customer service per altri mercati, all'interno del canale Wholesale. RESPONSABILITÀ LAVORATIVE PRINCIPALI Campagna di vendita Campagna post vendita ## Requisiti - Esperienza: almeno 3 anni di esperienza in un campo simile - Esperienza AS400 o Stealth è obbligatoria - Istruzione: Laurea universitaria - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese scritto e parlato è obbligatoria. jobs.title: E-Commerce Senior Merchandiser
jobs.description:
Reporting directly to the Head of E-commerce, the E-Commerce Senior Merchandiserwill own the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth.

Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Product Presentation & Onsite Strategy

Campaign Optimization

Cross-Functional Collaboration

## Requirements
- Master’s degree in Business Management, Marketing or Communications
- Strong understanding of campaign workflows and execution
- Ecommerce merchandising & category performance management
- Ability to manage Salesforce tools and search tools as a nice to have
- Ability to analyse daily and weekly sales, stock levels, sell-through and margin by category, collection and campaign, nice to have a Microstrategy background
- Product content optimization and analytics-driven decision making
- Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously are key
- Excellent communication and problem-solving skills
- Previous experience in managing junior resources is required
- Strong attention to details and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
- Fluent English is required; additional languages are considered a plus
- Results-oriented, proactive, and execution-focused, with a strong sense of ownership
- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively across multicultural and cross-functional teams
- Positive attitude, collaborative team player, and able to work independently when required

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Rapportando direttamente al Capo del Commercio Elettronico, il Senior Merchandiser E-commerce sarà responsabile della gestione completa del ciclo di vita dei prodotti traducendo le informazioni di mercato in assortimenti convincenti che stimolano le vendite e la crescita del marchio. Collaborerà in modo trasversale per garantire che il prodotto giusto sia al posto giusto al momento giusto, massimizzando l'impatto del cliente e le prestazioni aziendali. RESPONSABILITÀ PRINCIPALI Presentazione del prodotto e strategia Onsite Optimizzazione delle campagne Collaborazione trasversale ## REQUISITI - Laurea Magistrale in Management d'Impresa, Marketing o Comunicazioni - Buona comprensione dei flussi di lavoro delle campagne e della loro esecuzione - Gestione del merchandising e della gestione delle prestazioni delle categorie - Capacità di gestire gli strumenti Salesforce e di ricerca come bene da avere - Capacità di analizzare le vendite quotidiane e settimanali, i livelli di stock, il passaggio di vendita e il margine per categoria, raccolta e campagna, bene da avere una background Microstrategy - Ottimizzazione del contenuto dei prodotti e decisioni guidate dagli analytics - Eccellenti abilità organizzative e di gestione del tempo, con la capacità di gestire più progetti contemporaneamente - Eccellenti abilità di comunicazione e risoluzione dei problemi - Esperienza precedente nella gestione di risorse junior è richiesta - Buona attenzione ai dettagli e capacità di lavorare in un ambiente veloce - Inglese fluente è richiesto; ulteriori lingue sono considerate un plus - Orientato ai risultati, proattivo e focalizzato sull'esecuzione, con un forte senso di proprietà - Buone abilità interpersonali e di comunicazione, con la capacità di collaborare efficacemente in team multiculturale e trasversale - Attitudine positiva, collaborativo e in grado di lavorare indipendentemente quando richiesto ## BENEFICI - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi dalla Guess Community - Eventi di arte, sport e social fuori dall'ufficio, grazie alle nostre Guess Fun activities! - Piattaforma di formazione e sviluppo e percorsi - Sconto sui nostri prodotti sia online che in negozio

Er wird sich in einer kollaborativen Weise sicherstellen, dass das richtige Produkt an der richtigen Zeit an der richtigen Stelle ist, um Kunden und Geschäftsergebnisse zu maximieren. Il collaborera de manière transversale pour s'assurer que le produit approprié est en place à l'heure et au bon endroit, en maximisant l'impact du client et les performances commerciales. jobs.title: Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon & North America)
jobs.description:
The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams.

P&L and Business Management

Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management

Merchandising and Marketing Management

Reporting and Analytics

Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs.

## Requirements
- Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field
- Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central)
- Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers
- Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs
- Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis
- Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills
- Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams
- Good organizational and project management skills
- Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
- Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

Questo ruolo gestisce le prestazioni commerciali, supporta il P&L di Amazon e garantisce l'eccellenza operativa, la coerenza del marchio e una crescita sostenuta attraverso il coordinamento con Amazon, Marketplace NA, partner e team interni. descriptionByLocale.en: The Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon and North America) drives profitable brand growth on Amazon as both Vendor (1P) and Marketplace Seller (3P), while shaping marketplace strategy in North America. This role manages commercial performance, supports Amazon P&L, and ensures operational excellence, brand consistency, and sustained growth through coordination with Amazon, Marketplace NA, partners, and internal teams. P&L and Business Management Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising and Marketing Management Reporting and Analytics Additional Responsibilities Carry out additional tasks and projects as assigned in line with business needs. ## Requirements - Relevant experience of more than 7/8 years in the field - Previous experience in ecommerce roles with direct involvement in Amazon marketplace management (Vendor Central and/or Seller Central) - Strong understanding of Amazon operations, merchandising and performance drivers - Solid analytical skills with ability to interpret data and KPIs - Expertise working with Excel for Data Analysis - Strong commercial mindset with negotiation and stakeholder management skills - Experience working with external agencies and cross-functional teams - Good organizational and project management skills - Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment - Strong communication and stakeholder management skills - Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus ## Benefits - Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility - An International, fresh and dynamic working environment - Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community - Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities! - Training & Development platform and paths - Discount on our products both online and in stores
descriptionByLocale.de: Der Key Account & Marketplace Manager (Amazon und Nordamerika) treibt als Vendor (1P) und Marketplace Seller (3P) das profitable Markenwachstum auf Amazon voran und gestaltet gleichzeitig die Marktplatzstrategie in Nordamerika. Diese Rolle verwaltet die kommerzielle Leistung, unterstützt die Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung von Amazon und sorgt durch Koordination mit Amazon, Marketplace NA, Partnern und internen Teams für operative Exzellenz, Markenkonsistenz und nachhaltiges Wachstum. Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung und Geschäftsmanagement Amazon Vendor & Seller Operations Management Merchandising- und Marketingmanagement Reporting und Analysen Zusätzliche Verantwortlichkeiten Führen Sie zusätzliche Aufgaben und Projekte aus, die entsprechend den Geschäftsanforderungen zugewiesen werden. ## Anforderungen – Einschlägige Erfahrung von mehr als 7/8 Jahren in diesem Bereich – Frühere Erfahrung in E-Commerce-Positionen mit direkter Beteiligung an der Verwaltung des Amazon-Marktplatzes (Vendor Central und/oder Seller Central) – Ausgeprägtes Verständnis der Amazon-Abläufe, des Merchandising und der Leistungstreiber – Solide analytische Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, Daten und KPIs zu interpretieren – Fachkenntnisse im Umgang mit Excel für die Datenanalyse – Ausgeprägte kaufmännische Denkweise mit Verhandlungs- und Stakeholder-Management-Fähigkeiten – Erfahrung in der Arbeit mit externen Agenturen und funktionsübergreifenden Teams – Gute Organisations- und Projektmanagementfähigkeiten – Fähigkeit, mehrere Prioritäten zu verwalten ein schnelllebiges Umfeld – ausgeprägte Kommunikations- und Stakeholder-Managementfähigkeiten – fließend Englisch; zusätzliche Sprachen sind ein Plus ## Vorteile – Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben: Intelligentes Arbeiten (hybrides Arbeitsmodell) und Zeitflexibilität – Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld – Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, gefördert von Guess Community – Kunst, Sport und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -pfade - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Le responsable des comptes clés et du marché (Amazon et Amérique du Nord) stimule la croissance rentable de la marque sur Amazon en tant que fournisseur (1P) et vendeur du marché (3P), tout en façonnant la stratégie du marché en Amérique du Nord. Ce rôle gère les performances commerciales, prend en charge Amazon P&L et garantit l'excellence opérationnelle, la cohérence de la marque et une croissance soutenue grâce à la coordination avec Amazon, Marketplace NA, les partenaires et les équipes internes. Gestion du P&L et de l'entreprise Gestion des opérations des fournisseurs et vendeurs Amazon Gestion du merchandising et du marketing Reporting et analyses Responsabilités supplémentaires Effectuer des tâches et des projets supplémentaires assignés en fonction des besoins de l'entreprise. ## Exigences - Expérience pertinente de plus de 7/8 ans dans le domaine - Expérience antérieure dans des rôles de commerce électronique avec une implication directe dans la gestion du marché Amazon (Vendor Central et/ou Seller Central) - Forte compréhension des opérations, du merchandising et des moteurs de performance d'Amazon - Solides compétences analytiques avec capacité à interpréter les données et les KPI - Expertise de travail avec Excel pour l'analyse des données - Fort esprit commercial avec des compétences en négociation et en gestion des parties prenantes - Expérience de travail avec des agences externes et des équipes interfonctionnelles - Bonnes compétences organisationnelles et de gestion de projet - Capacité à gérer plusieurs priorités dans un environnement en évolution rapide - Solides compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes - Anglais courant ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus ## Avantages - Équilibre entre travail et vie personnelle : Travail intelligent (modèle de travail hybride) et flexibilité horaire - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets et ateliers durables promus par Guess Community - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: Planning & Allocation Project Manager (fixed term contract)
jobs.description:
The Project Manager supports the Retail teams by leading cross-functional projects aimed at improving planning, allocation, buying and merchandise planning processes, tools, and governance. The role ensures that strategic and operational initiatives are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives, contributing to sales optimization, inventory efficiency, and profitability across the EMEA and NA regions.

Acting as a key interface between Planning & Allocation, Finance, Buying, Retail Operations, IT, and Logistics, the Project Manager enables change, process standardization, and continuous improvement within a complex, fast-paced retail environment.

Stakeholder Management & Governance

Process & Change Management

Risk, Issue & Dependency Management

Budget, Resources & KPIs

Reporting & Documentation

Continuous Improvement

## Requirements
- Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Engineering, Project Management, or related field.
- Minimum 2-3  years of experience in project management, preferably in retail, fashion, supply chain, planning, or allocation environments.
- Experience working on planning, allocation, forecasting, or merchandise planning projects is a strong advantage.
- Solid project management skills (scope, timelines, resources, risks, budget).
- Skilled in designing and optimizing Power BI reporting frameworks
- Strong analytical mindset with ability to understand sales, stock, margin, and performance drivers.
- Experience working with planning and allocation systems and reporting tools.
- Proficiency in project management tools (e.g. MS Project, Jira, Asana, or similar).
- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills across all organizational levels.
- Ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic retail environment.
- Structured, proactive, and results-oriented approach.
- High level of ownership, accountability, and problem-solving capability.
- Team player with a collaborative and service-oriented mindset.
- Fluent English (written and spoken). Additional European languages are a plus.

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility;
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

jobs.title: Product Developer Apparel
jobs.description:
Reporting directly to the PD Manager, the Product Developer will be responsible for Design, researching, developing and launching new products for the Apparel lines.

He/she will be responsible for product development and planning throughout the product lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with the buying department and ensuring that revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met.

He/she will also ensure that the product is aligned with the strategy and goals of the business.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

## Requirements
- At least 4 years of relevant work experience in the same role and field
- Strong ability with Adobe (photoshop and Illustrator)
- Strong knowledge of womenswear and menswear required, preferably Outlet division
- Must prove to have a clear understanding of the Guess Brand DNA
- Knowledge of and experience using conventional and unconventional fabrics and materials
- Familiarity with vendor management and negotiation
- Must have excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up
- Excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all level
- Problem solving and negotiating skills
- Flexible in ever-changing, fast paced environment
- Deadline driven with a track record of delivering excellent results on time
- Extensive computer experience including but not limited to Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia
- Fluent English. Any additional language is considered a plus
- Ability to travel to all countries within the designated regions as required

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

descriptionByLocale.it: Alle dirette dipendenze del PD Manager, il Product Developer sarà responsabile della progettazione, della ricerca, dello sviluppo e del lancio di nuovi prodotti per le linee di abbigliamento. Sarà responsabile dello sviluppo e della pianificazione del prodotto durante l'intero ciclo di vita, compresa la raccolta e la definizione delle priorità dei requisiti del prodotto, lavorando a stretto contatto con il reparto acquisti e garantendo il raggiungimento degli obiettivi di fatturato e di soddisfazione dei clienti. Dovrà inoltre garantire che il prodotto sia allineato con la strategia e gli obiettivi dell'azienda. RESPONSABILITÀ PRINCIPALI DEL LAVORO: ## Requisiti - Almeno 4 anni di esperienza lavorativa pertinente nello stesso ruolo e nello stesso settore - Forte abilità con Adobe (Photoshop e Illustrator) - Richiesta una forte conoscenza dell'abbigliamento femminile e maschile, Deve dimostrare di avere una chiara comprensione del DNA del marchio Guess - Conoscenza ed esperienza nell'utilizzo di tessuti e materiali convenzionali e non - Familiarità con la gestione e la negoziazione dei fornitori - Deve avere eccellenti capacità organizzative con attenzione ai dettagli e al follow-up - Eccellenti capacità interpersonali e di comunicazione con l'abilità di interagire con un gruppo eterogeneo a tutti i livelli - Capacità di problem solving e di negoziazione - Flessibilità in un ambiente in continua evoluzione e dai ritmi serrati - Orientamento alle scadenze con un'esperienza consolidata nel fornire risultati eccellenti nei tempi previsti - Ampia esperienza informatica che include ma non si limita a Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia - Inglese fluente. Qualsiasi altra lingua è considerata un plus - Capacità di viaggiare in tutti i paesi all'interno delle regioni designate, come richiesto ## Benefici - Un ambiente di lavoro internazionale, fresco e dinamico - Programmi di salute fisica e mentale, progetti sostenibili e workshop promossi da Guess Community - Arte, sport ed eventi sociali al di fuori dell'ufficio, grazie alle nostre attività Guess Fun! - Piattaforma e percorsi di formazione e sviluppo - Sconti sui nostri prodotti sia online che nei negozi

descriptionByLocale.de: Der/die Produktentwickler/in ist direkt dem PD-Manager unterstellt und für Design, Forschung, Entwicklung und Einführung neuer Produkte für die Bekleidungslinien zuständig. Er/sie ist für die Produktentwicklung und -planung während des gesamten Produktlebenszyklus verantwortlich, einschließlich der Erfassung und Priorisierung von Produktanforderungen, der engen Zusammenarbeit mit der Einkaufsabteilung und der Sicherstellung, dass die Umsatz- und Kundenzufriedenheitsziele erreicht werden. Außerdem stellt er/sie sicher, dass das Produkt auf die Strategie und die Ziele des Unternehmens abgestimmt ist. HAUPTAUFGABEN: ## Anforderungen - Mindestens 4 Jahre einschlägige Berufserfahrung in derselben Funktion und in demselben Bereich - Ausgeprägte Fähigkeiten im Umgang mit Adobe (Photoshop und Illustrator) - Ausgeprägte Kenntnisse in der Damen- und Herrenmode erforderlich, Kenntnisse und Erfahrungen im Umgang mit konventionellen und unkonventionellen Stoffen und Materialien - Vertrautheit mit Lieferantenmanagement und Verhandlungen - Ausgezeichnetes Organisationstalent mit Liebe zum Detail und Follow-up - Ausgezeichnete zwischenmenschliche und kommunikative Fähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, mit unterschiedlichen Gruppen auf allen Ebenen zu interagieren - Problemlösungs- und Verhandlungsgeschick - Flexibilität in einem sich ständig verändernden, schnelllebigen Umfeld - Termintreue mit einer Erfolgsbilanz bei der fristgerechten Lieferung hervorragender Ergebnisse - Umfassende Computererfahrung, einschließlich, aber nicht beschränkt auf Microsoft: Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia - Fließendes Englisch. Jede weitere Sprache ist von Vorteil - Fähigkeit, je nach Bedarf in alle Länder innerhalb der vorgesehenen Regionen zu reisen ## Vorteile - Ein internationales, frisches und dynamisches Arbeitsumfeld - Programme für körperliche und geistige Gesundheit, nachhaltige Projekte und Workshops, die von der Guess Community gefördert werden - Kunst, Sport und gesellschaftliche Veranstaltungen außerhalb des Büros, dank unserer Guess Fun-Aktivitäten! - Schulungs- und Entwicklungsplattform und -wege - Rabatt auf unsere Produkte sowohl online als auch in den Geschäften
descriptionByLocale.fr: Sous la responsabilité directe du PD Manager, le Product Developer sera chargé de la conception, de la recherche, du développement et du lancement de nouveaux produits pour les lignes de vêtements. Il/elle sera responsable du développement et de la planification des produits tout au long de leur cycle de vie, notamment en recueillant et en hiérarchisant les exigences des produits, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec le service des achats et en veillant à ce que les objectifs en matière de chiffre d'affaires et de satisfaction des clients soient atteints. Il/elle veillera également à ce que le produit soit aligné sur la stratégie et les objectifs de l'entreprise. LES RESPONSABILITÉS PRINCIPALES DU POSTE : ## Exigences - Au moins 4 ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente dans le même rôle et le même domaine - Forte capacité avec Adobe (Photoshop et Illustrator) - Forte connaissance de la mode féminine et masculine requise, de préférence de la division Outlet - Doit prouver qu'il est possible d'obtenir un emploi dans le domaine de la mode, La connaissance et l'expérience de l'utilisation de tissus et de matériaux conventionnels et non conventionnels - Familiarité avec la gestion et la négociation des fournisseurs - Excellentes compétences organisationnelles avec une attention particulière aux détails et au suivi - Excellentes compétences interpersonnelles et de communication avec la capacité d'interagir avec un groupe diversifié à tous les niveaux - Compétences en matière de résolution de problèmes et de négociation - Flexible dans un environnement en constante évolution et au rythme rapide - Souci du respect des délais avec un historique de livraison d'excellents résultats à temps - Expérience informatique étendue, y compris, mais sans s'y limiter, Microsoft : Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint, Model Form, Enovia - Anglais courant. Toute autre langue est considérée comme un plus - Capacité à voyager dans tous les pays des régions désignées selon les besoins ## Avantages - Un environnement de travail international, frais et dynamique - Programmes de santé physique et mentale, projets durables et ateliers promus par la communauté Guess - Arts, sports et événements sociaux en dehors du bureau, grâce à nos activités Guess Fun ! - Plateforme et parcours de formation et de développement - Remise sur nos produits en ligne et en magasin

jobs.title: Product Developer Jewellery
jobs.description:
The Product Developer Jewellery is responsible for the development and planning of products throughout their lifecycle, including gathering and prioritizing product requirements, working closely with Design, Sales and Marketing teams and ensuring revenue and customer satisfaction. The role will also ensure that the product supports the business’ overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

ACTIVITIES

Product Development and Sourcing

Database and Style Creation

Vendor Monitoring

Interacting with other Guess departments

## Requirements
- Experience: years 3-5 of experience in a similar role in Jewellery field
- Education: University Degree
- Excellent knowledge of written and spoken English is mandatory. Any other European language is considered as a plus
- PC Skills: expert in Excel, strong experience in using planning and analytical systems, AS400 (Stealth)
- Proactively works toward set goals and has a problem solving mind-set
- Must possess the ability to handle multiple tasks/projects with adherence to deadlines
- Team player, dynamic personality, fast thinker, positive attitude and sense of urgency
- Open-minded and excellent interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to interact with a diverse group at all levels
- Availability to travel – including intercontinentally

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

jobs.title: Retail HR Intern
jobs.description:
Support all HR processes at Guess Europe, division Retail Switzerland in all its core Human Resources activities with a main focus on administration tasks.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Support in many HR processes such as:

HR Administration

Time Management

Payroll

Employee Relations

Recruitment Support

## Requirements
- Bachelor’s degree or equivalent (preferably in Human Resources or Personnel Management)
- Any progressive work experience will be considered a plus
- Required fluency in English and knowledge of German
- Further knowledge of French is considered a plus
- Strong analytical skills; knowledge of MS-Office (in particular Excel), any additional operational system or graphic competence is a plus
- Open-minded towards a multicultural environment; trustworthy in handling confidential information
- Kind and professional approach when handling various requests
- Customer oriented, approachable, and strong interpersonal skills
- Strong written and verbal communication skills
- A good team player

## Benefits
- Balance between work and personal life: Smart Working (Hybrid work model) and Time flexibility
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Community
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores

jobs.title: Senior Product Developer (Fixed-term Contract)
jobs.description:
Reporting to the PD Director Guess & Marciano Man, our Senior Product Developer is responsible for leading and managing the team of Apparel PD to research, develop, and launch new products for all Guess specific lines.

The role will coordinate and supervise the product planning and execution throughout the product lifecycle, including: gathering and prioritizing product and customer requirements in line with the retail direction, defining the product vision as well as the market needs, working closely with design, sales, marketing, production, sourcing & buying departments and forecasting to ensure revenue and customer satisfaction goals are met. The Senior PD's job also includes ensuring that the product supports the company's overall strategy and goals.

CORE JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

## Requirements
- At least 5-6 years of relevant work experience in a similar role
- Knowledge of and experience using various fabrics and materials
- Familiarity with vendor management and negotiation
- Excellent organizational skills with attention to detail and follow-up
- Problem-solving and negotiating skills
- Flexible in a fast-paced, ever-changing environment
- Deadline-driven with a proven track record of timely results
- High level of self-management and flexibility
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook, PowerPoint), Adobe Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop), Enovia and Centric
- Fluent English; additional languages are a plus
- Ability to travel internationally within designated regions as needed

## Benefits
- An International, fresh and dynamic working environment
- Physical & Mental Health programs, sustainable projects and workshop promoted by Guess Cares
- Arts, sports and social events outside the office, thanks to our Guess Fun activities!
- Training & Development platform and paths
- Discount on our products both online and in stores
